formulas.name: Cronbach's Alpha
formulas.formula: Calculates the reliability of a test or a set of test items
formulas.variables: Number of items, Sum of the items, Sum of the squares of the items, Sum of the products of the items
formulas.notes: Used to measure internal consistency reliability

formulas.name: Test-Retest Reliability
formulas.formula: Calculates the consistency of the test results over time
formulas.variables: Score 1, Score 2, Mean of Score 1, Mean of Score 2
formulas.notes: Used to measure stability or consistency of the test

formulas.name: Inter-Rater Reliability
formulas.formula: Calculates the consistency of the measurements made by different observers
formulas.variables: Score 1, Score 2, Mean of Score 1, Mean of Score 2
formulas.notes: Used to measure agreement between observers

formulas.name: Split-Half Reliability
formulas.formula: Calculates the consistency of the test results by dividing the test into two halves
formulas.variables: Score 1, Score 2, Mean of Score 1, Mean of Score 2
formulas.notes: Used to measure internal consistency reliability

formulas.name: Kappa Coefficient
formulas.formula: Calculates the agreement between observers beyond chance

formulas.name: Standardized Score
formulas.formula: Calculates a score that is standardized across different tests or populations
formulas.notes: Used to compare scores across different tests or populations

formulas.name: Coefficient of Variation (CV)
formulas.formula: Calculates the relative variability of a set of data
